title: soroseris hookeriana subsp. hirsuta
intro: Soroseris hookeriana subsp. hirsuta is a rare species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Soroseris hookeriana subsp. hirsuta include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, among others. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared in various ways, including tea infusions, decoctions, and infusions in combination with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties.
